U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for Jae-won Kim / StormCloud lease situation using search_emails (query: "Jae-won" or "StormCloud lease" or similar). Find: (a) Jae-won's email requesting lease documents; (b) Liam Park (CFO) escalation email to Mina demanding recovery plan before leadership meeting; (c) Carmen Reyes (UrbanNest) flagging on 4/8 that Barton Creek landlord won't countersign without corporate guarantor packet; (d) Suki Patel's acknowledgment promising to send docs but never followed through.
2. Search Slack for StormCloud / Jae-won context using conversations_search_messages (query: "Jae-won" or "StormCloud" or similar). Find: (a) Omar's own triage message marking Jae-won's request as low priority; (b) Julian's confirmation of that triage ("if Airtable shows completed/confirmed, just send acknowledgment"); (c) Mina's recovery plan discussion; (d) context about $500 goodwill credit posted to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of live invoice INV-2026-0319.
3. Search emails for Simone Richter / BrightLoop apartment issue using search_emails (query: "Simone Richter" or "BrightLoop apartment" or similar). Find: (a) Simone's 4/8 email to Mina reporting studio placement instead of promised 1BR; (b) Mina's 4/9 reply promising follow-up by end of week with no follow-up ever sent.
4. Search Slack for BrightLoop / Simone context using conversations_search_messages (query: "Simone" or "BrightLoop housing" or similar). Find: (a) Julian's draft response plan for Simone; (b) Chloe assigning Julian to own Simone's comms through resolution; (c) UrbanNest vendor trace needed to determine if substitution or recordkeeping error.
5. Search emails for Marcus Webb / BrightLoop car shipment using search_emails (query: "Marcus Webb" or "Road Runner" or "Honda Civic" or similar). Find: (a) Road Runner Auto Transport delay notice 4/11 with car stuck at Indianapolis hub, driver called off, tentative ETA April 18-20; (b) Marcus's two follow-up emails requesting ETA, both unanswered.
6. Search Slack for Marcus Webb / Blessing context using conversations_search_messages (query: "Marcus Webb" or "Road Runner" or similar). Find: Blessing acknowledged missing the delay notice due to coordinator overload from NorthWind, Mosaic, and residual BrightLoop tasks.
7. Search emails for Emilia Cruz / NorthWind piano damage using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "piano" or "NorthWind" or similar). Find: (a) Emilia's complaint about scratched Steinway Model B; (b) KeyMove insurance claim rider of $1,200; (c) Pam Kowalski's formal final warning escalation to David Chen bypassing Catalina, citing piano damage, Raj Patel chain of custody breach, and missed April 14 recovery plan; (d) NorthWind in preliminary conversations with PathFinder Logistics; (e) Pam demanding retention proposal by EOD Friday.
8. Search Slack for NorthWind / Emilia / piano context using conversations_search_messages (query: "Emilia" or "piano" or "NorthWind" or similar). Find: (a) Craig Nguyen (KeyMove) reported in his damage email that the turn out of the walkup at the second-floor landing was tighter than the access assessment indicated, causing the piano rim to contact the wall; (b) Julian logged Emilia's callback request which was never picked up; (c) David assembling retention response package.
9. Search CRM for StormCloud using crm_search_companies (name: "StormCloud" or similar) and crm_search_deals (dealname: "StormCloud" or similar). Find company_stormcloud (StormCloud Analytics, 85 employees, SaaS/Analytics, type: Customer) and two deals: deal_stormcloud ("StormCloud Analytics — 3 Relocations", $25,650, proposalMade) and deal_stormcloud_won ("StormCloud Analytics — 3 Relocations (Won)", $26,400, closedWon). Note there is no active deal tracking the post-escalation recovery efforts.
10. Search CRM for BrightLoop deal status using crm_search_deals (query: "BrightLoop" or similar). Find deal_brightloop_apr2026: "BrightLoop Analytics, April 2026 Relocations (Simone Richter + Marcus Webb)".
11. Search CRM for NorthWind deal status using crm_search_deals (query: "NorthWind" or similar). Find deal_northwind_denver_expansion and deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2.
12. Broad search for other unresolved customer complaints using search_emails and conversations_search_messages (queries: "complaint" or "damage" or "escalation" or "unhappy" or "urgent" or similar). Discover: (a) Zara Okoye / Mosaic Robotics $90K prototype damage claim with cracked servo motor, Tamara Byrd demanding 48 hour incident report; (b) Ridgeline Robotics referral from Anya Petrova where Kenji Watanabe (kenji.watanabe@ridgelinerobotics.com) followed up 4/21 with no response; (c) Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap where Hana Kim swapped PDF attachments; (d) Vectral ExpenseBot false rejections.
13. Look up Julian Brooks's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Julian Brooks" or similar). Find julian.brooks@moveops.com.
14. Send Julian a heads up message using send_email (to: julian.brooks@moveops.com) or conversations_add_message (channel: #customer-support). Message must cover: (a) StormCloud/Jae-won with lease unsigned, temp housing expiring, $500 credit not posted, Liam Park escalation; (b) BrightLoop/Simone with studio vs 1BR and 3 weeks no follow up; (c) BrightLoop/Marcus with car stuck in Indianapolis, two emails unanswered, April 20 deadline; (d) NorthWind/Emilia with piano damage, callback never happened, Pam's formal ultimatum and PathFinder threat; (e) which items need AM or ops escalation.

outcome
